---
title: "Prospectra"
---

# Geospatial analytics, indexed to the cell.

A geospatial practice in the making. Building publicly. First project ships May 26.

> Every business problem has a location. Most companies leave that signal on the floor. We pick it up, give it an address, and put it to work.

## Currently

Week 5 of a 6-month build. Block 1 of the curriculum cleared. First portfolio project ships Tuesday. Four more queued.

::: {.callout-note}
This scaffold is a placeholder. Full homepage with hero, manifesto, and project preview tiles ships in T6.
:::
